title: Ubiquiti AI Multi Sensor 4, UniFi Protect panoramic IP camera, 32MP, white
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Protect IP panoramic hybrid camera UVC-AI-MS-4-W is equipped with (4) independently adjustable 8MP sensors (each 3840 x 2160 px) at 30fps, providing a total field of view up to 360 ° , adaptive IR illumination for night vision up to 20m and IP66 and IK10 protection ratings. The camera can be connected to the network via 1Gbit LAN and supports PoE++ , with a maximum power consumption of 34.6W (4) 8MP 30fps sensors (3840 x 2160 px), up to 360 ° coverage (adjustable field of view per sensor from 42.8 ° to 108.8 °) Advanced AI detection of various objects and events Adaptive IR illumination - night vision range up to 20m Supports local recording on (2) microSD cards and (1) M.2 2280 SATA SSD Managed through UniFi Protect IP66 weather-resistant housing IK10 tamper resistance Power via 42.5-57V PoE, 802.3bt PoE++ Device Ceiling mount Mounting accessories
